sections.title: (Sovereign) DPI
sections.subtitle: Digital Public Infrastructure
sections.body: Nation-states run open, verifiable, privacy-preserving rails (identity, payments, registries, RWA, data + compute corridors).

sections.title: DeSci
sections.subtitle: Decentralized Science
sections.body: Shifting from experiments to a full scientific stack (open data, reproducible research, verifiable pipelines, new funding instruments).

sections.title: DePIN
sections.subtitle: Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks
sections.body: DePIN becomes a mainstream infra category (sovereign compute, energy, sensing, mapping, telecom, and resilience networks).

sections.title: Public Goods Funding
sections.subtitle: Sustainable Public Goods Markets
sections.body: PGF evolves into public markets for public goods (sustainable co-funding, repeatable granting, clear measurement, institutional legitimacy).

sections.title: DeFi
sections.subtitle: Decentralized Finance
sections.body: DeFi achieves global democratized access to payments and savings in valuable asset categories (major currencies, stocks, bonds).

sections.title: DeGov
sections.subtitle: Decentralized Governance
sections.body: Technology enables resilience towards misinformation and lifts the governance abilities of states and institutions.

sections.title: Network States
sections.subtitle: Digital-First Societies
sections.body: Network states develop permanent hubs and provide radical new ideas of how society can flourish.

sections.title: Improving Nations
sections.subtitle: Computing-Enabled National Development
sections.body: Computing leapfrogs national economies and creates wealth and security for developing nations.

sections.title: Climate / ReFi
sections.subtitle: Regenerative Finance
sections.body: New mechanisms enable sustainable climate finance. DePIN and MRV technology tackle the climate and biodiversity crisis.
